close_reason: Fixed. rustdeps-gen now uses 'name@version' as TOML key to support multiple versions of the same crate.
description: When Cargo.lock contains multiple versions of the same crate (e.g., webpki-roots 0.26.11 and 1.0.5), rustdeps-gen outputs duplicate [deps.crate-name] sections which is invalid TOML. The tool should either deduplicate or use array syntax.
title: rustdeps-gen produces duplicate TOML keys for multi-version crates
